# ML Models Directory
# =====================
# This directory stores trained model artifacts.
# Files here are auto-generated by train.py and loaded by predict.py.
#
# Expected files:
#   - edge_time_predictor.pkl     — Current trained model (scikit-learn)
#   - edge_time_predictor.h5      — Current trained model (TensorFlow, if used)
#   - model_metadata.json         — Training metadata (auto-generated)
#   - edge_time_predictor_vX.pkl  — Versioned model backups
#
# NOTE: Model files (.pkl, .h5, .joblib) are in .gitignore
